title: Destiny Disrupted
subtitle: A History of the World Through Islamic Eyes
author: Tamim Ansary
themes: History told from an Islamic perspective challenges Western-centric narratives
The Middle World as a distinct civilizational sphere
Parallel development and collision of Western and Islamic civilizations
The impact of colonialism on Islamic societies
Modernity as a crisis for the Muslim world
awards: Washington Post Best Book of the Year
excerpt: The Western narrative of world history is not the only narrative. This book tells the story of world history as it looks from the Islamic world — a perspective that has been largely absent from popular history writing.
